title: AI_OS Night Supervisor Alert Event
description: A single alert produced during night supervision (status, approval-needed, blocked, build-progress, SOS). This is a PREVIEW/evidence contract. delivered is always false in this model: real notification sending requires a separate approved channel and APPLY packet. No secrets, no live execution.

hour_id.description: Originating aios_supervisor_hour, or null for session-level alerts.

event_type.description: Canonical alert classes. Aligns with docs/specs/AIOS_PICAR_X_ROBOT_HELPER_SPEC.md alert classes plus build-progress and SOS extensions.

wake_worthy.description: Whether this alert should escalate to a wake-worthy notification (e.g. SOS, blocked, wake-failed). Routing preview only.

source.description: Subsystem that produced the alert, e.g. validator_automation, paper_trade_lab, build_prep.

evidence.description: Non-secret evidence string. Must never contain credentials, tokens, or keys.

channels_planned.description: Channels a future approved dispatcher WOULD route to (preview only). No channel is contacted in this model.

delivered.description: Always false. This model previews routing only; it never performs real delivery.
